playwright.description: Official Microsoft Playwright MCP (23 tools): drives a real browser through a user journey via accessibility snapshots.

lighthouse-perf.description: Lab audit: 0-100 performance score, LCP/FCP/CLS/TBT/SI/TTI, opportunities. (Python MCP; needs the `lighthouse` CLI on PATH.)

chrome-devtools-perf.description: Live/field capture via CDP: real FCP/LCP/CLS/TTFB, waterfall, screenshot, console errors. (Python MCP.)
